CustomField.description: Identifies the legal owner of the related Asset for visibility and reporting. [LOAD:No] [JUSTIFICATION:Contract Diary records are not data-loaded. They are created through a scheduler/flow.] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API:NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API:NA] [COMMENTS:NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Displays the owning entity of the associated Asset.
CustomField.label: Asset Owner
